description_long: This is a four-tiered, freestanding shelving unit with a minimalist, industrial design. The frame appears to be constructed from metal, with four vertical supports at each corner and horizontal crossbars supporting each shelf. The shelves themselves are flat and solid, with the bottom shelf featuring a grid or slatted pattern for ventilation or drainage. The overall color is a glossy black, giving it a sleek and modern appearance suitable for urban environments such as garages, workshops, or storage rooms. There are no visible doors, handles, or enclosed compartments, and the open design allows for easy access from the front and sides. The structure is robust and capable of supporting a variety of objects placed on its shelves.
description: A glossy black, four-tiered metal shelving unit with an open, industrial design and a slatted bottom shelf. It is sturdy, freestanding, and suitable for urban storage or utility spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing all four shelves, including the slatted bottom shelf and open access to each tier.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the shelves and the open, unobstructed design from the side.
description_view_2: Rear view, visually similar to the front, showing the open structure and shelf arrangement.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 1, with clear visibility of the shelf depth and open sides.
